messages.subject: RE: Checkout still failing for our team — third report
messages.body: Alex — this is the third time I'm raising this. Half of my team still cannot complete checkout on corporate Amex cards; they get an error after entering payment. We were told this would be fixed last week. We are evaluating whether to pause our rollout. Please advise today.

messages.subject: RE: Checkout still failing for our team
messages.body: Hi Priya — thanks for flagging. Engineering is investigating the Amex capture error and we expect a fix this week.

messages.subject: Enterprise Checkout — are we go for Friday?
messages.body: Team — Go/No-Go is Thursday. I'm seeing open P0s and PR-88 still not reviewed. Can we realistically ship Friday, or do we need to move the date? Need a clear read by EOD Thursday.

messages.subject: Weekly Engineering Digest
messages.body: Highlights from the week across all teams. (Routine — not launch related.)
